title: Frequently Asked Questions
description: Answers to common ZXSnake questions about gameplay structure, progression, and account-linked services.
summary: Quick answers for player onboarding and practical guidance across live and competitive play.
sourceNotes: Keep answers aligned to shipped app capabilities and remove any unimplemented roadmap text.

sections.heading: App basics
paragraphs: If this is your first time with ZXSnake, start with the core how-to and controls pages.
The app is available on iPhone and uses standard ZX Series progression and leaderboard systems.

sections.heading: Progression and rewards
paragraphs: BarkinMad Coins are used as reward progression and can support unlock activity across supported ZX Series titles.
Achievements and leaderboards remain available as long-term replay targets.

faq.question: Is online PvP currently available?
faq.answer: Yes. ZXSnake includes local and online multiplayer modes as part of the published feature set.

faq.question: Do achievements require internet?
faq.answer: Achievement visibility is tied to connected service features and score submission flows configured in the app.

faq.question: Can I earn BarkinMad Coins?
faq.answer: Yes. Coins are earned through gameplay progression in the shipped app flow.
